indications.text:
1.1 Rheumatoid Arthritis including Polyarticular Juvenile Idiopathic Arthritis
Otrexup is indicated in the management of selected adults with severe, active rheumatoid arthritis (RA) (ACR
criteria), or children with active polyarticular juvenile idiopathic arthritis (pJIA), who have had an insuffici...
